raw_consumer_statement:
Attention : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, Barclays XXXX XXXX [ last name undisclosed ] Dear XXXX XXXX [ last name undisclosed ], Thank you for your letter of XX/XX/2024. 

Unfortunately, contrary to your belief, the issue remains unresolved. 

I kindly ask once again that you please explain why/ how Barclays pays a merchant XXXX amount and charges its client a higher amount? 

Such is the fundamental question underlying the dispute at hand. 

It may be more expeditious to have a conversation with you or another Barclays representative. I have left multiple messages at the number included in your letters with no response to date. I would most sincerely appreciate a return call. 

As repeated before, I am very interested in resolving this dispute and ensuring that my health insurance coverage is not placed at risk. 

Thank you, XXXX XXXX
